articles.title: Even Property Owner Can Be Guilty of Trespass: Kerala HC Explains Why
articles.summary: “Offences such as criminal trespass and house trespass are offences against possession and not against ownership. Therefore, even a true owner cannot, under the guise of ownership, unlawfully enter premises in the lawful possession of another with the intent to commit an offence.” The post Even Property Owner Can Be Guilty of Trespass: Kerala HC Explains Why appeared first on SCC Times.
